title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Birla Tyres Holdings Services - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Process Engineer Vacancy at Birla Tyres Holdings Services - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Birla Tyres Holdings Services has an exciting opening for a Process Engineer at our Ahmedabad office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Birla Tyres Holdings Services:
Birla Tyres Holdings Services is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Learning & development budget
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Ahmedabad, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Birla Tyres Holdings Services!
